attempts.strategy: Define a Prop-valued predicate: M locally free of rank d iff there is an open cover U : ι → X.Opens (⨆ U i = ⊤) with each restriction (pullback along (U i).ι) Nonempty-isomorphic to SheafOfModules.free (ULift (Fin d)) over the open subscheme's ringCatSheaf.
attempts.code_tried: def IsLocallyFreeOfRank {X : Scheme.{u}} (M : X.Modules) (d : ℕ) : Prop := ∃ (ι : Type u) (U : ι → X.Opens), (⨆ i, U i = ⊤) ∧ ∀ i, Nonempty ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (U i).ι).obj M ≅ _root_.SheafOfModules.free (R := (U i).toScheme.ringCatSheaf) (ULift.{u} (Fin d)))
attempts.insight: free needs Type u, so Fin d is ULift.{u}-lifted; covering opens kept in universe u via X.Opens to avoid the Scheme.OpenCover two-universe inference failure (that route fails — do not retry). Axiom-clean; checker confirms predicate is substantive (non-vacuous both directions).

next_steps: Matches blueprint def:is_locally_free_of_rank with correct \lean{...} name; sync_leanok added \leanok. No further work.

attempts.strategy: Prove the missing-from-Mathlib engine lemma Ann(S⁻¹M) = (Ann M)·S⁻¹R for f.g. M by le_antisymm. ⊇: image of an annihilator element annihilates Mₚ (mk'_smul_mk', mk'_one, mk'_zero). ⊆: write y = mk' a s; each generator m gives ∃ uₘ∈S, uₘ•a•m=0 (mk'_eq_zero + eq_zero_iff); take U = ∏ uₘ over the spanning finset (Finite.fg_top); U·a ∈ Ann R M (span_induction helper); then mk' a s = algebraMap(U·a)·mk' 1 (U·s) ∈ map.
attempts.code_tried: apply le_antisymm; [⊆ branch] obtain ⟨⟨a,s⟩,rfl⟩ := IsLocalization.mk'_surjective S y; choose u hu using hgen; refine ⟨∏ x ∈ t.attach, u x.1 x.2, ?_⟩; Finset.dvd_prod_of_mem …; heq via mk'_eq_mul_mk'_one + mk'_eq_iff_eq; exact Ideal.mul_mem_right _ _ (Ideal.mem_map_of_mem _ hUa)
attempts.insight: mk'_surjective returns a match/Function.uncurry form — dsimp only [Function.uncurry] after obtain ⟨⟨a,s⟩,rfl⟩. Module.Finite is genuinely required (false without it). Axiom-clean. NOTE: it is a lean_aux with no blueprint block — coverage debt for the planner.

next_steps: Supplies the ALGEBRA half of def:modules_annihilator's map_ideal_basicOpen coherence. Planner must add a blueprint lemma block (coverage debt) — see recommendations.md.

findings.blocker: Missing QCoh→IsLocalizedModule bridge. Scheme.IdealSheafData is the right vehicle (ideal U := Module.annihilator Γ(X,U) (M.val.obj (op U.1))), but its map_ideal_basicOpen coherence field needs the section restriction M(U)→M(D(f)) to be IsLocalizedModule (powers f). Mathlib's SheafOfModules.IsQuasicoherent is site-level (via QuasicoherentData); the concrete 'sections localize at basic opens' statement exists only in the Spec-specific ModuleCat.Tilde development, not for general X.Modules.

attempts.strategy: Scoped out Scheme.IdealSheafData as target type; identified the three facts needed for map_ideal_basicOpen: (1) Γ(X,D(f))=IsLocalization.Away f — EXISTS (IsAffineOpen.isLocalization_basicOpen); (2) M(U) Module.Finite — needs a finite-type hypothesis on M; (3) section restriction is IsLocalizedModule (powers f) — MISSING for general X.Modules. Built the algebra engine (#3 above) but could not supply the QCoh bridge.

The def's signature must carry quasicoherence + finite-type. Build the bridge IsLocalizedModule (powers f) (M.val.map (homOfLE …).op) from quasicoherence + affine U (transport ModuleCat.Tilde localization or extract from QuasicoherentData), then assemble via the engine lemma. Multi-step scheme-theoretic build.

next_steps: Effort-break in blueprint: (i) the QCoh→IsLocalizedModule bridge lemma; (ii) wire finite-type hypothesis into the def signature; (iii) thin assembly of map_ideal_basicOpen via the landed engine lemma + IsAffineOpen.isLocalization_basicOpen. Do NOT re-dispatch the monolithic def.

findings.blocker: No tensor/monoidal structure on SheafOfModules in Mathlib at the pinned commit. The section graded ring is ⊕_{m≥0} Γ(X_s, L_s^{⊗m}), requiring tensor powers L^{⊗m}; MonoidalCategoryStruct X.Modules fails to synthesize and no SheafOfModules/PresheafOfModules tensor lemmas exist, so L^{⊗m} cannot even be named.
